title: carum neurophyllum
intro: Carum neurophyllum, also known as Wild Carrot or Queen Anne's Lace, is a biennial plant belonging to the carrot family (Apiaceae). The medicinal properties of Carum neurophyllum lie in its essential oils, which contain carvone, limonene, and other compounds with potential health benefits. The health benefits of Wild Carrot include its ability to act as a diuretic, reduce inflammation, and support digestion, making it a popular natural remedy for various ailments. Wild Carrot can be prepared as an herbal tea, infusion, or tincture, with the dried roots and leaves typically used in these herbal preparations.
